togo.title: TOGO
togo.technologies: Git - JavaScript - ReactJS, nodeJS, expressjs, mongoDB
togo.description: This project consists of a backend application for a task management application. It utilizes Express.js as the web server framework and MongoDB as the database. The application provides endpoints for user registration, login, logout, user profile, and CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on tasks.
